treePosition: As presented in the workbook, following Het-Heru — see Sekher's provenance note on how this ordering was inferred.
teachingNotes: Power to remove obstructions from our life based on toxic thinking, false belief, confusion.
Elimination of negative thoughts, self doubt, self hate, self sabotage.
Cultivating the Conviction based on the Law (Truisms) that moves the Life Force to accomplish our goals.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being endowed with the ability to reprogram my psyche through the repetition of the laws of God.
I am changing who, and what I believe I am, by affirming the 11 laws, reasoning with them, and living them. Thank you, God, for the endowment.
It is self-evident that the universe came into being through an all-knowing, all-powerful being. I know God, period, full stop.
I speak peace to power. Not anger, fear, worry, grief, sadness, and stress. Thank you, God, for endowing me with mastery over my mind.
I take neither gain nor loss to heart. They are just words.
I use the great gift of speech to praise God for giving me the power to define my reality through speech.
